docket_entries.description: NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG 15, 2024, IN DEPT. 304, IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR PENDING COORDINATION WITH JCCP 5188 OR NOTICE FROM COUNSEL THAT THIS CASE WILL NOT BE COORDINATED WITH JCCP 5188. (D304)
